fields.summary: Represents a HarfBuzz color value with BGRA byte ordering.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`HBColor` wraps the native `hb_color_t` type used throughout HarfBuzz color APIs. The
underlying 32-bit value uses BGRA byte ordering: `0xBBGGRRAA` (blue in the high byte,
alpha in the low byte). This differs from <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor>, which uses
`0xAARRGGBB`.

Use the named properties (<xref:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor.Red>, <xref:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor.Green>,
<xref:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor.Blue>, <xref:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor.Alpha>) to access color
channels without needing to understand the internal layout. Conversions to and from
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor> are available via the extension methods in
<xref:SkiaSharp.HarfBuzz.ColorExtensions>.

`HBColor` is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
// Create from individual channels
var red = new HBColor(255, 0, 0, 255);

// Access channels by name
byte r = red.Red;   // 255
byte g = red.Green; // 0
byte b = red.Blue;  // 0
byte a = red.Alpha; // 255

// Convert from SKColor
HBColor hb = SKColors.CornflowerBlue.ToHBColor();
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> struct from a raw <c>hb_color_t</c> value.

params.value: The raw 32-bit color value in BGRA byte ordering (<c>0xBBGGRRAA</c>).

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> struct from individual color channel values.

params.alpha: The alpha channel value (0–255), where 0 is fully transparent and 255 is fully opaque.

entries.signature: public HBColor (byte red, byte green, byte blue, byte alpha);

fields.value: The alpha channel value (0–255), where 0 is fully transparent and 255 is fully opaque.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to another <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> value.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if both instances represent the same color; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.other: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> to compare with this instance.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified object.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is a <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> with the same value; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The object to compare with this instance.

fields.summary: Returns the hash code for this instance.
fields.returns: A hash code for the current <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" />.

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> values are equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> represent the same color; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor left, HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor right);

fields.summary: Explicitly converts a raw 32-bit BGRA value to an <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> with the given raw value.

params.value: The raw 32-bit color value in BGRA byte ordering (<c>0xBBGGRRAA</c>).

entries.signature: public static explicit operator HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor (uint value);

fields.summary: Implicitly converts an <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> to its raw 32-bit BGRA value.
fields.returns: The underlying raw 32-bit color value in BGRA byte ordering (<c>0xBBGGRRAA</c>).

entries.signature: public static implicit operator uint (HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor color);

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> values are not equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> do not represent the same color; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor left, HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor right);

fields.summary: Returns the color as a hexadecimal string in <c>#AARRGGBB</c> format.
fields.returns: A string representation of the color in the form <c>#AARRGGBB</c>.

fields.value: The 32-bit packed color value in BGRA byte ordering (<c>0xBBGGRRAA</c>).
